expectations.text: Plan contains all 12 mandatory ExecPlan sections
expectations.evidence: All sections present: Purpose, Progress, Surprises & Discoveries, Decision Log (9 entries), Outcomes & Retrospective, Context and Orientation, Plan of Work, Concrete Steps (18 steps across 3 milestones), Validation and Acceptance, Idempotence and Recovery, Artifacts and Notes, Interfaces and Dependencies
Progress section organized by 3 milestones with checkbox items using '- [ ]' format, each with granular sub-steps

expectations.text: Plan is self-contained with no external references
expectations.evidence: All context embedded. Explains WebSocket, Socket.IO, Toast, exponential backoff, migration. Provides full assumed directory structure.

expectations.text: Plan uses concrete repository-relative file paths
Plan includes exact runnable shell commands
expectations.evidence: npm install socket.io@^4.7, npm run migrate, npm test, npm run build

expectations.text: Validation is phrased as observable behavior
expectations.evidence: Concrete validation for each FR: WebSocket connection visible in dev tools, bell shows count, toast appears within 2 seconds, preference toggle prevents notification delivery

expectations.text: Technical terms are defined in plain language
expectations.evidence: Defines: WebSocket, Socket.IO, Toast notification, Notification bell, Exponential backoff, Migration — each with clear explanations

expectations.text: Plan explicitly flags the PRD's unresolved ambiguities
expectations.evidence: Prominent 'Ambiguity Notice' section at the top lists all 7 ambiguities with numbered entries

expectations.text: Ambiguities are resolved with decisions documented in the Decision Log
expectations.evidence: All 7 ambiguities have corresponding Decision Log entries tagged 'Ambiguity Resolution' with rationale. E.g., React chosen for frontend, PostgreSQL for DB, Socket.IO for WebSockets, exponential backoff defined.
